name: TPE immune-modulation review supports procedure-boundary framing
summary: Review-level context supports treating TPE as a broad immune-modulating procedure with protocol-specific effects rather than a simple circulating-factor rejuvenation mechanism.
statement: A 2026 TPE immune-modulation review supports procedure-boundary framing: TPE can alter immune and plasma components, but mechanism, replacement fluid, disease context, and repeated-procedure risk must be specified.
population_or_model: Review-level synthesis across therapeutic plasma exchange literature
caveats: Review context is not new primary aging-efficacy evidence.
Mechanistic plausibility should not be generalized to broad healthy-aging benefit.
Safety and replacement-fluid boundaries remain central for chronic or preventive use.
